pitch: Imagine if a Workplace Slow-Burn show had a baby with a Legal Drama miniseries, and that baby grew up to be a Retired Assassin currently being sued.
title: BREACH OF CONTRACT & OTHER INTIMATE DETAILS
synopsis: Silas Vance just wants to enjoy his quiet retirement and perfectly organized spice rack until a class-action lawsuit from twelve disgruntled former targets drags him into Manhattan’s most litigious courtrooms. Forced to share a conference room with the sharp-witted lead plaintiff attorney, he navigates hostile negotiations, mandatory team-building retreats, and increasingly personal objections over lukewarm office coffee. As depositions drag into the night and discovery requests reveal his carefully buried romantic past, Silas must decide whether to settle quietly or risk everything in a workplace romance where every handshake could be a trap.

quirk: who has been replaced by a doppelgänger and nobody noticed
pitch: Set in a world where Liminal Space Horror and Period Piece (corsets, scandals) coexist uneasily, our hero — a Himbo Pirate who has been replaced by a doppelgänger and nobody noticed — must save... something. Probably a town.
title: THE PIRATE WHO INHERITED AN INFINITE CORRIDOR
synopsis: When a remarkably cheerful, broad-shouldered pirate mysteriously inherits a vessel that is actually a sprawling Victorian ballroom stretched across an endless, fluorescent-lit hallway, he assumes it’s just part of the promotion package. But as his crew begins wearing starched crinolines to swab the decks and parlor doors open directly into gray static, our himbo captain realizes he isn’t the original pirate—and nobody has noticed for months. To save the drifting coastal town trapped between dimensions, he must navigate a scandal involving mismatched wigs, missing first mates, and one very confused doppelgänger currently enjoying his benefits. The fate of reality hangs by a corset lace, a jolly roger, and sheer unearned confidence.

pitch: Pitch: Prestige Misery Drama x Conspiracy Thriller. Tone: dread, but make it horny. Lead: a Murder-Hobo Adventurer in their flop era.
title: DRIFTMAN’S DREAD: A CAMPFIRE CONFESSION
synopsis: After two decades of tracking apex predators and assassinating targets across three continents, washed-up drifter Gus Vance has hit rock bottom—literally sleeping in a damp dry camp while his gear rots. When a cryptic redacted dossier surfaces from his old expedition archives, it reveals that the shadow syndicate he once hunted for profit was actually funding the collapse of his own legacy. Now living out of a single backpack and driven by a sweaty, desperate hunger for relevance, Gus must navigate claustrophobic safehouses and paranoid interrogations to uncover who really erased his name. It’s a slow-burn descent into bureaucratic hell where every shivering campfire moment feels painfully intimate, and the conspiracy is as heavy as the damp wool on his back.
